record: B4 Gate B physical iOS evidence — Task 1 device smoke

host.signingMechanismClaim: development install signing only; no distribution claim

workingToolchain.standaloneLaunch: process alive 8 s after devicectl launch

failedToolchain.result: app crashes at launch: EXC_BREAKPOINT (SIGTRAP) in UIApplicationEvaluateRuntimeIssueForNoSceneLifecycleAdoption
failedToolchain.attribution: iOS 27 traps apps built against SDK 27 without UIScene lifecycle adoption; the Capacitor shell uses the legacy UIApplicationDelegate lifecycle. Crash is absent when the identical source is built against SDK 26.5.
failedToolchain.productConsequence: UIScene lifecycle adoption is required before any future SDK 27 build; out of B4 scope, owed to C-series before Apple mandates SDK 27 submissions.

boundaries: Physical-device development smoke only. No store, Cloudflare/R2, distribution or certification claim. Learner data untouched beyond app-container lifecycle.
